tests.name: local repository quality gate
tests.summary: make validate passed on the public branch after adding the Sprint 10 closure promoter. It covered npm dependency installation, Go module verification, go vet, Go unit tests, go test -race, reproducible linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 builds, kernel smoke, MCP smoke, worker smoke, alpha test, 98 Python tests, and repository validation.

tests.name: Sprint 10 Python evidence tooling
tests.summary: Unit tests cover Radeon runtime receipt capture, runtime readiness verification, source snapshot manifest verification, model candidate benchmarking, embedding benchmarking, competition-profile recovery binding, the one-shot Sprint 10 evidence runner, public-summary application, independent-review readiness, and fail-closed close-receipt promotion.

tests.name: Sprint 10 closure promoter
tests.summary: The promoter refuses to close Sprint 10 unless rollback is demonstrated, all real Radeon acceptance gates are true, the review artifact lives under docs/evidence/sprint-10/reviews, and the candidate remains non-authoritative before promotion.

tests.name: Radeon model candidate contract
tests.summary: The benchmark now rejects missing candidate schema_version and non-loopback model endpoints. The public candidate example validates through the benchmark parser and remains safe because it contains only loopback URLs and placeholder local model identifiers.

tests.name: real Radeon runtime gate
tests.summary: The known Radeon instance refused SSH on 36.150.116.206:31200, so no real runtime receipt, real model benchmark, real embedding benchmark, or instance-destruction recovery evidence is claimed yet.
